title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MONGOLBONGOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAPUL, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO SAN VICENTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3457 / 57 OG No. 8, 1375 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2827, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO MONGOLBONGOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAPUL, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO SAN VICENTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Mongolbongol in the Municipality of Capul, Province of Samar, is changed to San Vicente.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
